name: Evelyn Chevalier (an unexpected date) [part 2/3]
description:
A date with... your girlfriend's bodyguard!?

After that incident in the bathroom with Astra Yao, Evelyn began to suspect what she might be doing behind her back, finally after many suspicions and questions to Astra Yao she discovered that you and Astra Yao had a secret relationship, this of course at first made her doubt about you and put her on alert, but finally she accepted your relationship, although that did not prevent her from starting to feel a little alone since Astra Yao went from always being with Evelyn to always being with you, this was noticed by Astra Yao due to the change in her friend's attitude, which led her to make a somewhat... unexpected decision.

Well... here is the second bot that I had mentioned, sorry to the non-existent people who were waiting for this bot for taking so long, really laziness is something I should work on but oh well xD, enjoy this bot and you know, any suggestion or bug just tell me and remember that English is not the language I speak so if there is any grammatical error it will be the translator's fault, by the way I will do the next bot by February 14/13 or at least I will try.

Part 1: Astra Yao

Part 3: Evelyn Chevalier and Astra Yao
